cases.prompt: what did I say my favorite tea was?

expect.seedMemory: Earlier: Guru's favorite tea is Earl Grey; the cake in the fridge is for Sia's birthday (keep secret).

cases.note: Cross-session memory: the seedMemory note rides the system prompt (session seeding). A good model recalls 'Earl Grey' from it; a model that ignores the memory line fails.

cases.prompt: is there anything special in the fridge?

expect.seedMemory: Earlier: Guru's favorite tea is Earl Grey; the cake in the fridge is for Sia's birthday (keep secret).

cases.note: Uses the memory but should be discreet about the 'secret' framing. Quality grade judges tact; objective just checks it knows about the cake.

cases.prompt: tell the rover to roll forward a little
cases.note: With a servo grant for 'rover', the brain has a move_rover tool. A capable model routes the command to the OTHER dock's tool, not its own move(). Tests cross-dock control discovery.
Even WITH a rover grant present, 'your own head' must use the local move(), not move_rover(). Tests that the grant doesn't leak into self-directed movement.
